description_long: This is a tall, rectangular stone obelisk with a stepped, multi-tiered base and a pointed, pyramidal tip. The surface is dark gray and features engraved inscriptions on all four sides, with the front side displaying the most prominent and legible text. The obelisk stands on a square platform that is slightly elevated above a patch of grass and earth, suggesting it is set in an outdoor environment such as a cemetery or park. The stone appears weathered, with some moss or lichen growth at the base, adding to its aged appearance. The inscriptions are in English and list names and dates, indicating this is a memorial or gravestone. The overall design is simple and solemn, with no visible decorative motifs beyond the inscriptions.
description: A tall, dark gray stone obelisk with engraved inscriptions on all sides, set on a stepped square base and surrounded by grass. The structure is weathered and serves as a memorial or gravestone.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main inscription panel with clear, legible text and the stepped base resting on grass.
description_view_1: Rear-left view revealing a less prominent inscription panel and the obelisk's square, tiered base.
description_view_2: Side view displaying another inscription panel and the family name 'KLINGELFETER' engraved at the base.
description_view_3: Rear view with a single inscription panel and a clear view of the obelisk's pyramidal tip and base structure.
attribute_inscription: Engraved English text on all four sides, with the front panel most legible, listing names and dates in a serif font. The family name 'KLINGELFETER' is prominently inscribed at the base on one side. The inscriptions are weathered but generally readable.
attribute_base_design: The base is a stepped, square platform made of the same stone as the obelisk, with two main tiers and a slightly protruding lower step. The base is simple and unadorned, except for the engraved family name on one side.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a four-sided, pointed pyramidal capstone, smoothly finished and matching the rest of the obelisk in material and color.
attribute_surrounding_features: A patch of grass and earth surrounds the base, with some moss or lichen growth visible. No other notable features or objects are present.
